name: Xp Log Fundo Investimento Imobiliario FII
summary: Xp Log Fundo Investimento Imobiliario FII is a real estate investment fund that invests in logistics properties in Brazil. The fund aims to generate income and capital appreciation for investors by acquiring and managing a diversified portfolio of logistics assets such as warehouses and distribution centers. It focuses on properties located in strategic locations with strong growth potential in the logistics sector.
